sentences.text: Hey, Nathan.
How's it going?
I'm good, how are you?
Doing well.
Good, good to see you.
How's everything going?
Yeah, things have been good.
There's been a lot of changes in my life since we last spoke.
I have a little one now.
I remember you were about to have a little one.
Yeah, yeah, he's 5 months old now, it's…
Wow, crazy.
It's crazy how fast the time's gone by.
Yeah, that's crazy.
It is.
That's awesome.
He's at the stage… thank you.
He's, he's at the stage now where he… Easily rolls from his stomach to his back, and then he's gotten to the point where he'll roll from his back to his stomach now, one direction, so…
Very cool.
It's kind of cool seeing his little personality and everything develop on him.
Yeah, that's awesome.
What's his name?
Kyler, with a K.
Kyler, that's cool, very cool.
Yeah, and I, I, so, like… You know how girls are always like, oh yeah, I already have my 15 names picked out, like.
Yeah.
school.
I had a girlfriend one time ask me, like, a name that I liked.
And it made me think, I was like, you know, Kyler's a cool name, and then, out of nowhere, there was Kyler Murray come about, which is a football player, but I liked the name before.
Before that.
Before that, yeah, so…
That's awesome.
What about you?
Any… any new things in your world?
Just… just busy work's crazy, and, you know, how it goes.

It's one of those, you know, it's… it's like, I feel like we start the year… and you get, you know, April, May, or you get January, February, March, and then you hit April, and it's all the conferences and all that stuff, and that takes you to June, and then it's the summertime, and June to September, and then September comes, and it's like, now it's budget season.
So, I mean, the rest of my year is shot.
for budgets.
So, it's, it's interesting.
It's a, it's an interesting, interesting prerogative, I guess you can say.
But I did want to talk with you, because I know we've talked in the past, we've looked at different things.
And I want to make sure I understand.
So basically, if I have Rentable, if I use Rentable, then you guys are placing us on sites that we're not using.
for that $200, I think it was $200 a property, or whatever it was, for per month.
Correct.
And then that's putting us on, like, if we're not using Zillow, you would put us on Zillow.
If we're not using Apartments.
com, you would put us on Apartments.
com.
Correct.
The only one we don't partner with is Apartments.
com, though.
Yeah, harness.
com.
Okay, so it would be Zillow, Zumber.
all of those, all of the other sites except for farmers.
com.
Exactly.
Okay.
So, and is it still $200 per month, or…
It is, somehow.
There you go, that's good.
Is there any discount if you put the whole portfolio on, or… As far as that goes.
There is.
For 20… because you, what, still have 24 properties?
We have 23 right now, we have one under contract, and probably another one under contract coming.
So, by the end of the year, we'll probably be 25.
Okay.
Is what I'm thinking.
Okay.
So, for 25, our rate goes down to $175 a month per property.
So it's $200 for regular, And then it goes to $175 if it's 25 or plus.
Correct.
But if you only have 24 properties, like, we would give it to you for $175.
Okay.
Yeah, I mean, we would prob… I think we would definitely have, what, 24 by the end of the year?
It's just I'm not… I'm not sure when we would get the last one, but, I mean, I think it's coming.
And then,
As far as contracts go and all that stuff, is it a year contract?
Is it a 6-month contract?

We normally do annuals, right now we're running a special where we can do as low as 6 months, but come… I don't know when you would be looking to make a move, but, like, come November, I can't promise that that's an option.
Okay.
think it would be.
Yeah, I mean, well, I mean, I would probably do 12 months.
That probably would be okay.
I mean, I'll tell you what's going on.
So, we have been partnered with Zillow.
Apartments.
com, and Zumper.
And Zillow, we're on… You know, Zillow bought Rent.
com.
And…
you know, they keep saying, oh, well, we're adding all of this value and all this stuff.
Well.
What's ended up happening is we're getting more unqualified leads.
And we're getting…
You know, our… so our leads are not qualifying.
as they did before, when they were just Zillow.
On top of that, we're also getting, you know, like.
They're… they're just… they just refuse.
Like, we had… we had a property where a resident Moved out.
Four months later, she moved back.
But when she moved back, she added her son to the lease.
Well, her son had registered with Zillow.
To look for an apartment on his own.
But he moved back in with his mom instead, and we got charged for that lease, and they won't take it off.
And I'm just… so, I told him, I said, you know what, you want to die on the… if you want to die on this hill.
you can hold me to a $660, you know, expense, and I will remove all $14,000 that we spend.
on a monthly basis.
So, you know, now that I've done that, now they're trying to, you know, oh, we need to have a call, we… no.

You didn't do the right thing, and listen, I understand there's policies and procedures in place, and I get all that, but if I can go to you guys and pay 200 bucks, and you partner with Zillow, and you could put us on Zillow's network, why would I… why would I pay Zillow?
Right.
So, I mean, that's… that's basically where my thinking is.

So, I don't… I think that this is a great option, and I think that's what I'm gonna do, is probably remove us from Zillow completely, and just let you guys, you know, go with you guys instead, and let you guys handle that.
You know, the other ones, Zumper does… Zumper does a great job for us.
Apartments.
com, on the properties that we have them.
They do a great job.

We just got… we ended up about 2 years ago getting rid of… A bunch of properties, because they're smaller properties, and, you know, you're paying… $700 or $800 a month, and you're only getting 4 leases a year, well, that doesn't… it doesn't math out.
Right.
it was like, let's make some changes.
So we did, and but that's where we're at, but I really… I do… I really like the premise of Rentable.
Do you guys have anything new coming down the pike, or anything like that that you want to talk about?
So, not necessarily new, but I mean, there's been improvements.
We still utilize AI, so we're making sure we're getting you on the better performing sites.
So, like, instead of getting you on 30 sites and 3 working, and then us trying to beat a dead horse and get results out of these bottom 3 over here.
We would then take the spin that we would use on those bottom three and put it towards the top 3 to double down on the efforts there.
Okay.
We also have all-inclusive targeted social ads still.
So, we're gonna get you on Facebook and Instagram, and reach out to renters versus waiting for them to come to you.
So, anytime somebody says, okay, I'm looking for apartments in Houston, Texas.
They search for that on Google, they don't find anything, they get on their Facebook because they're bored.
Within 45 seconds of scrolling, they'll see a targeted, runnable ad with a picture of your property and details about it.
Okay.

And then, where they differ from a lot of other companies, is, like, and this is what, like, everybody has been telling me is, that I've spoken with, is like, well, this company redirects them to their site, and then they can see all the other properties that they're advertising for, or they'll redirect them to your property website, which… That's great, but at the end of the day, you lose if it becomes a lead, or if it doesn't, like, you don't… you just don't know.
All of ours are lead generating, so we capture their names, their emails, and their phone numbers, and then we'll deliver that to you into your NOC CRM.
Okay.
Okay.
Yeah, I mean, I think everything sounds good.
Will you do me a favor?
Will you.
I can… Do you have a sample contract that I can review?
Yes, I do.
I'm trying to think if I had a sample contract last time.
Let me… let me look real quick.
if you can send it over so I can look at it, review it, you know, and if I… and that way, if I have any questions, we can knock that out before I go… And add everything.
Yeah.

My exec team is in Europe right now, so I don't know… they'll be back probably 2 weeks, and then I'm traveling, I'm on vacation through the 29th, so it'll probably be beginning of August that I get back, or beginning of October that I get back with you on moving forward on it.
Okay.
And we probably won't move forward until January 1st.
And, you know, make everything live as of then, but… Are you doing any specials for the end of the year?
Like, you know, sign up for a year and get a month free, or something like that?
Yeah, yeah, so, like, if you sign up, like, let's say we do everything, you sign up in October, I can delay your first bill until January 1st.
Okay.
So we can get you live as soon as possible, but then you wouldn't have to pay anything until the start of the new year.

Yeah, so let's look at that and see, send over the… when you have a chance, send over that contract, let me review it, and that way, if there's any questions or anything… any concerns that I have, I can let you know before we go to exec team.
Okay.
Because by the time it goes to them, I want to.
I want to have it just so they can sign off on it and be done.
And then we can go… once that's done.
then I can send you over the list of properties and all that stuff, and I'll get approval for all that.
I do have a call with Zillow this week.
Our contracts with them are not up until December, so we're actually in November.
So, if we did start this, and we did the delay start until January, but we were on in October, I think it'd be great.
Because I do… Zillow would be one of the prop… if we come off of Zillow, I would want to go on Zillow with you guys, so that that way we're not losing that traffic, but we're just not paying.
900, you know, $600 and something dollars lease.

And what would happen there, that same AI tool that makes sure we're getting you on the better sites, it'll make sure we're not duplicating it, so, like, during that time that you're still with Zillow, like, we won't push there and duplicate anything.
Right.
Once you drop it, it'll… it's smart enough to realize that, and it'll pick up.
Okay.
Alright.
Sounds good.
Well, it was great to see you.
Congratulations on Kyler, and congratulations to your wife, and… Yeah, I'm sure we'll be in touch, and and be there.

I mean, you said third time's a charm, and it was really funny, because I had… the other day, I was… when all this happened with Zillow, I was like, okay, I need to call… I'm like, what is his… I'm like, Nathan Warren, he's having a baby.
literally the next day, you emailed me and said, hey, third time's a charm.
I'm like, well, I'll do on that, because it actually is, I think this is actually gonna happen now.
That is hilarious.
Yeah, so, I mean, I think that's where we're… that's kind of where we're at, is I think… I… I wanna… I wanna stop this… Spend with them.
And then… but if I can get that deal with you guys, and then that… Now, let me ask you this, is there… does it cap out?
Like, so if you spend $200, you're… you're capped out, and then the ads stop, or do you just continue throughout the whole month?
We continue throughout the whole month.
Okay.
Okay.
Yeah, so it's a no-brainer.
Yeah.
We don't do anything like that to you.
Yeah, uncapped leads, uncapped everything.
That's awesome.
And I'll send you over the agreement.
It came to me a long time ago.
Yeah, I know, right?
Tried telling you last year.
I know.
But, what I could do is, when I send over that sample agreement, I'll just go ahead and send it over for, like, if you're doing all 24 properties.
Yeah.
I mean, I'll put it in at the 20… So the property that's not there, so…
When did I send you the list, do you remember?
You did not send me a list.
I went back and looked to see if I had another sample proposal, but I did not.

So, I can send you a list, Go ahead and shoot over… I'll send over a list, and that way you can just put our properties in there, and then if they work out, this works out, and if it doesn't, it doesn't, but that way you'll have them in there.
We've sold a couple properties over the last 6 months, and then we bought one.
So there'll be a couple different differences on there, but I'll get that sent over to you in the next, half hour here.
That works.
You do that, I'll, I'll get to work on that, and then I'll have it shot over to you here soon.
Alright, thanks, I appreciate it so much.
No problem, Ryan.
No problem.
Have a good one.
Enjoy your vacation.
Thank you, you too.
I'll talk to you soon.
Yeah.
